outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran rebuilding military industrial base faster than expected, already producing drones, according to US intel
outlets.summary: CNN reports US intelligence finds Iran has restarted drone production during the ceasefire, with reconstitution far exceeding IC timelines — could restore full capability in 6 months.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: House fails to invoke War Powers Act against Iran war by single vote, 213-214
outlets.summary: The closest Congressional vote yet to constrain Trump's Iran war authority failed by one vote; the razor-thin margin signals wavering GOP support but no binding check on presidential war powers.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Pakistan's top general arrives in Tehran for highest-level mediation push as Trump deadline looms
outlets.summary: Pakistan Army Chief Munir's arrival in Tehran represents the highest-level diplomatic intervention since the April 8 ceasefire, as Trump gives Iran days to respond to a uranium deal framework.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Vance: Trump is 'locked and loaded' — Iran has days to abandon nuclear program or face renewed war
outlets.summary: VP Vance warned Iran has two choices: surrender its nuclear program or face the full weight of a resumed US military campaign, with Trump reportedly coming within 60 minutes of launching fresh strikes on May 19.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump: 'We will get' Iran's enriched uranium and 'probably destroy it' — no nuclear deal without HEU transfer
outlets.summary: Trump drew a firm line: the US will seize and destroy Iran's ~440kg HEU stockpile, directly colliding with Tehran's offer to downblend it domestically rather than surrender it.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: US imposes 13th sanctions round on Iran — construction sector, nuclear-linked materials — as talks continue
outlets.summary: Treasury and State simultaneously sanctioned Iran's IRGC-linked construction sector and 10 nuclear-related materials — the 13th round since NSPM-2 — while Pakistan-mediated talks remained active.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Oil Rebounds as Vance War Threat Counters Iran Diplomacy Signal — Brent $108.76
outlets.summary: Brent crude rebounded to $108.76 (+36.2% from pre-war) as Vance's 'locked and loaded' warning and Trump's uranium seizure demand offset earlier diplomatic optimism from Iran's 'narrowed gaps' signal.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Pakistan army chief arrives in Tehran as Trump says nuclear talks on 'borderline'
outlets.summary: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arrived in Tehran for talks, while Trump described negotiations as on the 'borderline' between a deal and resumed strikes, giving Iran a self-imposed deadline of days.

outlets.name: RFERL
outlets.headline: Iran Talks In Critical Window: Uranium Disposal Deadlock Threatens Collapse of Ceasefire
outlets.summary: Iran's willingness to downblend HEU domestically versus Trump's demand for US retrieval and destruction represents an unbridgeable gap that could torpedo the ceasefire within days.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 'Not going to let them have it': Trump insists US will get Iran's enriched uranium
outlets.summary: Trump drew the central line in nuclear negotiations: the US will seize and destroy Iran's HEU, in direct contradiction to Tehran's downblend offer — the deadlock that could trigger war resumption within days.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran is rebuilding its military faster than the West expected — and that changes everything
outlets.summary: US intelligence confirms Iran already restarted drone production during the ceasefire, raising the stakes: if Israel and the US don't act soon, Iran may restore meaningful deterrence within months.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: War 'not over', pushes Trump for military action as talks near critical deadline
outlets.summary: Netanyahu pressed Trump in a tense call to resume military action rather than accept a diplomatic framework, even as Washington moved toward a deal framework — a growing US-Israel divergence.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian commits government's full capacity to modernization of Iran's Armed Forces
outlets.summary: President Pezeshkian met Army Commander Hatami to pledge full government support for military modernization, a domestic signal that Iran is strengthening defenses even as diplomacy proceeds.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran reviews latest US proposal: Tehran says 'diplomacy is wiser than war,' uranium disposal remains deadlocked
outlets.summary: Iran's Foreign Ministry confirmed it is reviewing Washington's latest response while insisting on domestic control of its uranium stockpile — a position that directly contradicts Trump's demand for US retrieval.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: US Intel: Iran already producing drones again in ceasefire — 50% of capability intact, China supplying parts
outlets.summary: US intelligence findings disclosed to CNN reveal Iran's military-industrial reconstitution has exceeded IC timelines, with China continuing to supply components — framing the ceasefire as a strategic advantage for Tehran.
